title: Creature Bonds (Beast Bond)
description: Beast Bond reaction triggers — species-pair bonded reactions. AncientBeast Tier S #6 residuo. See data/core/companion/creature_bonds.yaml.

species_pair.description: Pair of species ids forming the bond. Order-insensitive at runtime; identical species (twin pack) allowed.

reaction_type.description: counter_attack: bonded ally fires reactive strike at attacker (-1 damage_step). shield_ally: bonded ally absorbs 50% of damage (transfer).

trigger_range.description: Manhattan distance ally→target threshold. counter_attack also requires bond ally→attacker within actor.attack_range.

cooldown_turns.description: Turns of cooldown after firing. Tracked per-actor on actor._bond_cooldown.
